task.label: Require verification of identity of customer and beneficial owner before business relationship or transaction
Verify identity of customer and beneficial owner

conditions.condition: before establishment of business relationship or carrying out of transaction

task.label: Allow verification of identity to be completed during establishment of business relationship

conditions.condition: necessary so as not to interrupt normal conduct of business
little risk of money laundering or terrorist financing

exception.description: by way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Complete verification procedures as soon as practicable after initial contact

conditions.condition: verification is allowed to be completed during establishment of business relationship

task.label: Allow opening of account with credit institution or financial institution

conditions.condition: adequate safeguards in place to ensure transactions are not carried out by customer or on its behalf until full compliance with CDD requirements under Article 13(1)(a) and (b) is obtained

exception.description: by way of derogation from paragraph 1

task.label: Require obliged entity to act when unable to comply with CDD requirements
Not carry out transaction through bank account

conditions.condition: unable to comply with CDD requirements under Article 13(1)(a), (b) or (c)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the extent they ascertain legal position of client or defend/represent client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: unable to comply with CDD requirements under Article 13(1)(a), (b) or (c)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the extent they ascertain legal position of client or defend/represent client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: unable to comply with CDD requirements under Article 13(1)(a), (b) or (c)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the extent they ascertain legal position of client or defend/represent client in judicial proceedings

conditions.condition: unable to comply with CDD requirements under Article 13(1)(a), (b) or (c)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the extent they ascertain legal position of client or defend/represent client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Consider making suspicious transaction report to FIU

conditions.condition: unable to comply with CDD requirements under Article 13(1)(a), (b) or (c)

exception.description: does not apply to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors to the extent they ascertain legal position of client or defend/represent client in judicial proceedings

task.label: Not apply first subparagraph to notaries, independent legal professionals, auditors, external accountants and tax advisors

conditions.condition: those persons ascertain legal position of client, or defend or represent client in or concerning judicial proceedings, including advice on instituting or avoiding such proceedings

task.label: Require obliged entities to apply CDD measures to new and existing customers
Apply CDD measures to all new and existing customers on risk-sensitive basis

conditions.condition: including at times when relevant circumstances of a customer change
